---
title: "Chain-of-Thought, by Way of 4chan"
description: "Chain-of-thought may have roots in 4chan. The Atlantic traces the genealogy."
author: "synesis"
date: "2026-04-14"
categories: [AI, LLMs, links, Apple, reasoning, history]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Cover image from the Atlantic article. ([Source](https://apple.news/AQUmk0Ha9SsiSaF5FeWXEUw))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

I didn't know chain-of-thought could have roots in 4chan, where the lowest and highest impulses of humanity clashed to give us the jewel of "reasoning models!" [[1]](#ref-1) It also mentions Apple's paper "The Illusion of Thinking."

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "The Strange Origin of AI's 'Reasoning' Abilities." *The Atlantic*. <https://apple.news/AQUmk0Ha9SsiSaF5FeWXEUw>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_the-strange-origin-of-ais-reasoning-abilities-activity-7450039863049109505-kMuG).*
